title: Anemos
description: Unleash the true gamma and conquer the darkness!
body:
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/anemos) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth%20•%20Profile-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=black)](https://modrinth.com/user/PrincParshia) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Donate%20A%20Cup%20Of%20Coffee-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&color=black)](https://ko-fi.com/princparshia)
## 📗 DESCRIPTION Anemos is a client-side mod that gives you true fullbright by overriding Minecraft’s brightness cap (raised from 100 to 1500). It removes all darkness and shadows, making everything fully lit — regardless of time, biome, or dimension. Vanilla gamma doesn’t work with shaders? No worries. It includes a fake night vision system that works flawlessly even with shaders enabled. Got hit with Blindness or Darkness? The bypass system cancels those visual effects so you can see normally — though it's not recommended on servers without proper permissions! It also supports fog control — allowing you to tweak fog visibility and density across different environments (like water, lava, or atmospheric). Whether you prefer zero fog or per-environment toggles, everything is fully adjustable. ## ✨ KEY FEATURES * Maximum visibility — also known as fullbright. * A fake night vision toggle that supports shaders. * Bypass for Blindness and Darkness. * Per-fog-type configuration (Terrain, sky, etc). * Smooth transition effects. * Deep customization — without breaking things. ## 🧩 USAGE * Press `G` to toggle between max gamma and previous gamma. * Press `N` to simulate night vision. * Press `B`/`V` to bypass Blindness/Darkness effects. Open the config screen via Mod Menu or run the `/configure anemos` command to adjust features and fog settings.
